title: The Woodland Stalker Reimagined
body:
# **The Woodland Stalker Reimagined** 

![The Woodland Stalker Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8de1d760d0c6d213242a0193317f15e19d68358_0.webp)

This creature is a strange, mysterious, and terrifying entity that lives deep within dark forests and vast caves. It is commonly found in forests, especially during the night, where its horrifying screams and the sounds of footsteps echo through the trees. Step by step, it slowly approaches its prey, ready to gnaw on bones and crush every part of its victim. Be careful when exploring forests and caves... and remember: light is its greatest weakness...

## Features :
- Its Very Fast
- Climbing Walls
- Passes Through 1 Block
- Very Scary And Disturbing
- Spawning In Dark Forests & Caves
- Never Dies
- Very Strong
## Informations :

Hello guys, if you notice any errors or some problems in the modification, please contact me through my accounts on social media sites.

Also, guys, when recording a video about it, you should put the mod link in the description or anywhere you want, so that the viewer can access it

Also, the mod needs Geckolib to Work.

For better Atmosphere Make sure to do this :

- Remove any Gamma & Night vision mods.
- Set the brightness to Moody.
- Install Ambient sounds & sound physics mods.
- Use Darkness mods for better Atmosphere
- Do not Sleep at all
- Play In Old growth pine taiga to increase tension

## Remake Version

An enhanced version of The Woodland Stalker Reimagined is coming soon, featuring numerous changes:

- Sounds : Improving sound quality and adding new sounds
- Animations : Improving animations and adding new animations
- Textures : Improving the texture quality and enhancing its colors
- Model : Improve the creature's appearance, making it more terrifying and more distorted.

Its release date will be soon.
